author: codex
scope: Codex-only deterministic/manual relation cleanup prep; no provider-backed commands, post-ingest LLM harnesses, materialize/export-jsonl/full validate/DB publish, generated-output edits, durable retirements, replacement submissions, LOG edits, manifest edits, canonical/generated edits, or code edits applied

checkpoint_context.not_repeated: This prep uses relation054 as requested and does not repeat relation053.

bucket.name: ADA station-list claim incorrectly modeled as has_claim under aggregate count claim
bucket.cleanup_direction: retire and replace with supports claim -> claim
bucket.rationale: Current has_claim is scoped to page/context owners pointing to claims, not nested claim ownership. The source block contains both the aggregate ADA station count and the station list, so preserving the association as a supports relation is narrower and better matches the evidence.

replacement_absent.note: Only the earlier next25 triage note mentions the proposed local id; no accepted submission, canonical relation, retired override, or existing batch prep contains the deterministic replacement entry.

replacement_endpoint_shape_valid_under_p.reason: supports is registered in RELATION_FAMILY_BY_KIND as dependency_or_reference and has no strict RELATION_ENDPOINT_SHAPES row, so relationEndpointShapeIssue returns undefined for claim -> claim.

original_endpoint_shape_invalid_under_pa.endpoint_shape_issue: Relation kind has_claim expects project|route|corridor|entity|source|event|treatment_component -> claim, got claim -> claim.

evidence_supports_semantics.summary: The same figure block states the 23 completed / 6 end-of-year ADA station counts and then lists ADA projects completed since 2020 and to be completed by end of year. That supports a list-style claim referencing an aggregate count claim without modeling the aggregate claim as an owner of the list claim.

no_generated_files_edited.note: The shared worktree already contains unrelated generated-output and durable data edits owned by others. This task writes only data/review_notes/codex-relation-cleanup-batch054-prep.json and does not edit retired.json, submissions, canonical JSONL, materialized data, wiki output, LOG, manifest, code, or generated files.

original.label: 23 Stations Since 2020 has claim stations completed list

tool_args.label: 23 Stations Since 2020 has claim stations completed list

proposed_retired_json_entry.reason: Codex relation cleanup batch054 replaces malformed has_claim claim -> claim relation relation_23-stations-has-claim with source-backed supports claim -> claim relation preserving the ADA station-list support for the aggregate 23-stations count.

original.reason: The original relation uses a has_claim endpoint shape that current relation rules reject; the cited block supports a claim-support relation instead of nested claim ownership.

id_generation.method: createSubmissionEntry(runId, rawToolArgs, '2026-06-23T00:00:00.000Z') with relationEndpointIssues added; stable hash is over normalized tool_args.

tool_args.label: ADA station list supports 23 stations since 2020 count
tool_args.raw_text: 23 stations completed since 2020 and 6 stations to be completed by the end of the year; ADA Projects Completed Since 2020 / To Be Completed By End of Year station list

payload.description: The source map gives the aggregate ADA station counts and the station list in the same evidence block; the list-style claim supports the aggregate count claim.

raw_tool_args_for_replay.label: ADA station list supports 23 stations since 2020 count
raw_tool_args_for_replay.raw_text: 23 stations completed since 2020 and 6 stations to be completed by the end of the year; ADA Projects Completed Since 2020 / To Be Completed By End of Year station list

payload.description: The source map gives the aggregate ADA station counts and the station list in the same evidence block; the list-style claim supports the aggregate count claim.

evidence_blocks.summary: A map block with ADA completed/end-of-year legend, the aggregate count of 23 completed stations and 6 end-of-year stations, and station names under the completed/end-of-year headings.

steps: Add the proposed_retired_json_entry for sub_5d04512e0ab539f9 to data/submission-overrides/retired.json.
Append the accepted replacement entry sub_cf1282558f5bd73f to data/submissions/2026-06-23_codex_relation_cleanup_batch054.jsonl.
Do not change relation endpoint-shape rules for has_claim or supports.

local_validation.tooling: Read-only rg/sed/node/bun --eval inspection plus createSubmissionEntry/relationEndpointIssues/relationEndpointShapeIssue dry-run using direct local imports; no appendSubmission, materialize, export-jsonl, full validate, DB publish, provider-backed command, post-ingest LLM harness, generated-output command, durable data edit, or code edit run.

commands_run: pwd && rg -n "sub_5d04512e0ab539f9|relation053|relation054|has_claim|23-stations|ADA|station-list|batch054|createSubmissionEntry|local_observation_id" data/review_notes data/submissions packages/pipeline/src packages/harness/src 2>/dev/null

rg -n "sub_5d04512e0ab539f9|relation_23-stations-has-claim|claim_23_stations_completed_since_2020|claim_ada_stations_completed_since_2020_list|relation_ada_station_list_supports_23_station_count" data/submission-overrides/retired.json data/submissions data/canonical/relations.jsonl data/canonical/claims.jsonl raw/sources/meeting_doc_121711/blocks.jsonl data/review_notes -g '!data/review_notes/codex-relation-rule-or-data-next25-prep.json'
node read-only retired hit check for sub_5d04512e0ab539f9
node read-only replacement local id / exact supports pair collision check
bun --eval '<createSubmissionEntry dry-run for relation054 replacement using direct local imports; no appendSubmission>'
node read-only p009_c0003 evidence block summary
node read-only exact original submission hit check

git status --short -- data/review_notes/codex-relation-cleanup-batch054-prep.json data/submission-overrides/retired.json data/submissions data/canonical packages/pipeline/src/records/relations.ts LOG.md
